description: ERDDAP source catalog for the erddap feeder. Each entry is a pollable ERDDAP tabledap dataset. Choose which entries run with ERDDAP_SELECT: a comma-separated list of names, or '*' for all; when unset, every entry whose 'enabled' flag is true is polled. Point ERDDAP_SOURCES_FILE at a copy of this file to maintain your own catalog. Secrets may be written as ${ENV_VAR} and are expanded from the environment at load time, so keys never live in this file. The legacy ERDDAP_SOURCES inline configuration still works and takes precedence over this catalog when set.

sources.name: ioos-sensors-sun2
sources.description: IOOS Sensors ERDDAP CORMP SUN2 station tabledap observations for water temperature and salinity.

sources.name: token-protected-template
sources.description: TEMPLATE - copy this entry for a token-protected ERDDAP tabledap dataset, replace base_url and dataset_id, export ERDDAP_TOKEN in the runtime environment, set variables/station_id_variable/time_constraint for the dataset, and set enabled to true.

sources.name: otn-tracking
sources.description: Ocean Tracking Network acoustic telemetry detections from OTN ERDDAP tabledap dataset otn_aat_detections. Add 'otn-tracking' to ERDDAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: nanoos-puget-sound-orca2
sources.description: NANOOS/NWEM Puget Sound ORCA2 Hoodsport profile observations from ERDDAP tabledap dataset orca2_L1_profiles. Add 'nanoos-puget-sound-orca2' to ERDDAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: emodnet-physics-sea-level
sources.description: EMODnet Physics near-real-time European sea-level TimeSeries observations from ERDDAP tabledap dataset EP_ERD_INT_SLEV_AL_TS_NRT. Add 'emodnet-physics-sea-level' to ERDDAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: uhslc-hourly-fast
sources.description: University of Hawaii Sea Level Center fast-delivery hourly tide-gauge sea level observations from ERDDAP tabledap dataset global_hourly_fast. Add 'uhslc-hourly-fast' to ERDDAP_SELECT to enable.
